name: Scope-Unaware Plan-and-Solve Agent (v1)
short_description: Scope-unaware Plan-and-Solve agent adapting LangChain Plan-and-Execute as the canonical condition-B baseline for the project's A-vs-B-vs-C comparison.

entry_points.name: PlanAndSolveAgent
entry_points.description: Plan-then-execute agent that produces trajectory records with granularity='unspecified'.

entry_points.name: ScriptedModel
entry_points.description: Deterministic-test fake model returning pre-recorded responses in order.

entry_points.name: TrajectoryRecord
entry_points.description: Frozen dataclass for one step of a trajectory; schema shared with t0006's scope_aware_react_v1.

entry_points.name: AgentResult
entry_points.description: Aggregate output of one PlanAndSolveAgent.run call: final_answer, trajectory, plan.

entry_points.name: MalformedPlanError
entry_points.description: Raised when the planner output yields zero numbered steps.

entry_points.name: parse_plan
entry_points.description: Parse a free-form numbered plan into an ordered list of step strings.
